title: ResurrectionSpinev1
description: Resurrection-specific safeDefaults layered on top of the invariants/metrics spine. Defines default novelty bands, metric bands, and safety caps per (objectKind, tier), plus repetition limits for CHATDIRECTOR planning and runtime gating.

version.description: Semantic version of the resurrection spine view, e.g., '1.0.0'.

profiles.description: Default resurrection profiles keyed by contract family and tier.

objectKind.description: Contract family this profile applies to.

tier.description: Constellation tier for which this profile is the default.

noveltyBand.description: Default distance band for novelty for this (objectKind, tier) pair, in [0,1]. Tiers can narrow or widen this band.

min.description: Minimum normalized distance allowed for resurrections under this profile.

max.description: Maximum normalized distance allowed for resurrections under this profile.

metricBands.description: Default absolute bands for entertainment metrics during resurrections. Values must be subsets of the canonical ranges defined in entertainment-metrics-spine.v1.json.

safetyCaps.description: Hard caps for invariants/metrics during resurrections. These must not exceed canonical spine ranges.

maxResurrectionsPerBranch.description: Soft or hard limit on resurrection count per ancestor branch for this (objectKind, tier).

distanceMetrics.description: Catalog of allowed distance metrics for resurrection novelty, referenced by distanceMetric identifiers in requests, Rust, Lua, and telemetry.

vectorComponents.description: Which invariants and metrics participate in the distance computation.

invariants.description: Invariant abbreviations to include in the distance vector, e.g., ['DET', 'SHCI'].

normalization.description: How raw values are normalized before distance is computed (e.g., 'spine-range', 'z-score').

metricBand.description: Absolute band for a single entertainment metric for resurrection runs.

min.description: Minimum allowed metric value for this profile.

max.description: Maximum allowed metric value for this profile.

invariantCap.description: Safety cap for an invariant (e.g., DET) during a resurrection.

max.description: Maximum allowed invariant value for this profile.

metricCap.description: Safety cap for a metric like CDL or ARR during a resurrection.

max.description: Maximum allowed metric value for this profile.
